title: ASR Outdoor Gold Rush Gold Prospecting Kit Classifiers Vials Sifting Pans - 11pc
description:
Whether you’re a new gold panning hobbyist or seasoned gold prospector, the ASR Outdoor 11pc Gold Panning Kit includes essential gold mining tools that will prepare you to properly, and successfully, sort, classify and store recovered gold flakes, gold nuggets, gems or other precious metals from your deposit. The ASR Outdoor 11pc gold panning kit includes the following equipment: two glass screw top storage vials, magnifying tweezers, two regular 10 inch gold pans, one plastic snifter bottle, one plastic shovel scoop, one large 14 inch gold pan, a magnetic separator pick up tool, one small 8 inch gold pan, one 1/2 inch mesh classifying screen and one 1/4 inch mesh classifying screen

ASR Outdoor Gold Rush Gold Prospecting Kit Classifiers Vials Sifting Pans - 11pc

Whether you’re a new gold panning hobbyist or seasoned gold prospector, the ASR Outdoor 11pc Gold Panning Kit includes essential gold mining tools that will prepare you to properly, and successfully, sort, classify and store recovered gold flakes, gold nuggets, gems or other precious metals from your deposit. The ASR Outdoor 11pc gold panning kit includes the following equipment: two glass screw top storage vials, magnifying tweezers, two regular 10 inch gold pans, one plastic snifter bottle, one plastic shovel scoop, one large 14 inch gold pan, a magnetic separator pick up tool, one small 8 inch gold pan, one 1/2 inch mesh classifying screen and one 1/4 inch mesh classifying screen.

Key Features

  • 11PC GOLD PANNING KIT: Whether you’re a new gold panning hobbyist or seasoned gold prospector, the ASR Outdoor 11pc Gold Panning Kit includes essential gold mining tools that will prepare you to classify, pan and store recovered gold, gems or other found specimens
  • MUST HAVE GOLD PANS: Essential to successful gold prospecting are reliable riffled pans and classifier screens; the ASR Outdoor gold pans included in this kit are constructed from heavy duty plastic and come in a deep high contrast green color to help better spot gold; the classifier screens feature 304 steel mesh wire and conveniently fit on the rim of a five gallon bucket
  • GOLD PROSPECTING ACCESSORIES: The magnifying tweezers, snifter bottle and glass vials will be convenient to reach for if you’re lucky enough to pan some gold flakes or gold nuggets, gems or other precious metals from your deposit! These tools will allow you to extract, examine and store your newly discovered specimens when on site and keep them safe and secure
  • QUALITY MATERIALS: From the high impact, durable plastic classifier screens, gold pans and shovel scoop, to the metal magnifying tweezers and trusty magnetic pick up tool, all the components of this gold panning kit will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come
  • YOUR KIT INCLUDES: (2) glass screw top storage vials, (1) magnifying tweezers, (2) 10 inch gold pans, (1) plastic snifter bottle, (1) scoop, (1) 14 inch gold pan, (1) magnetic separator pick up tool, (1) 8 inch gold pan, (1) 1/2 inch and (1) 1/4 inch mesh classifying screens

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROGPK-11PC
  • UPC: 060886095439
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 11pc Combo

Essential to successful gold prospecting are reliable riffled gold pans and classifier sieves or screens; the ASR Outdoor gold pans included in this kit are constructed from heavy duty plastic with feature a unique riffle design; the pans also come in a high contrast deep green color to help spot gold. The classifier screens feature 304 steel mesh wire, making them rust resistant and conveniently, the screens fit on the rim of a five gallon bucket for additional classifying as needed.

And, should you be so lucky to recover gold flakes or gold nuggets, reach for the mini LED flashlight, magnifying tweezers, snifter bottles and glass vials; these tools have been thoughtfully selected to help and allow for easy and convenient onsite extraction, examination and storage of found gold.

All the equipment included in this complete gold panning kit are made from quality materials; from the high impact, plastic classifier screens and gold pans, to the durable metal magnifying tweezers, multipurpose scoop and trusty snifter bottle, all the components will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come!
